LAW AND MOTION, 301, DEFENDANT DOROTHY GEORGE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND; PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IS DIRECTED TO READ AND COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6(B). MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189
NOTICE OF OPPOS TO DEMURRER; P&A; DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOLINARI, JOSEPH AS SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE OF THE LIVING TRUST

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT DOROTHY GEORGE'S MOTION TO STRIKE PUNITIVE DAMAGES IN THE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: JOYCE D. LONG, CSR # 8620 301/PJB

MATTER ON CALENDAR, WEDNESDAY, JUNE 23, 2010. NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PARTY. DEFENDANT DOROTHY GEORGE'S MOTION TO COMPEL WRITTEN DISCOVERY IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $660, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT HEWLETT JR., NOT REPORTED (612).
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

Off Calendar Jun-15-2010 Continued To Aug-09-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Written Discovery
Off Calendar Jun-23-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Matter on calendar, Wednesday, June 23, 2010. No appearance by either party. DEFENDANT DOROTHY GEORGE's Motion To Compel Written Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $660, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Commissioner Everett Hewlett Jr., not reported (612).
